title: Xperiti — Enterprise Research Platform
excerpt: From product vision to a shipped enterprise research platform — product thinking, IA, UX/UI, and Angular frontend development.
problem: Xperiti needed an integrated platform for qualitative and quantitative research management — complex workflows, multiple user roles, and data-heavy interfaces.
approach: We started with competitive analysis and product thinking, defined information architecture for research teams, and mapped user flows across admin, researcher, and client roles.
solution: Full UX/UI design system, high-fidelity prototypes, and production-ready Angular frontend — dashboards, reporting, and collaboration flows built for scale.
results: A shipped enterprise research platform used by teams in the US market, with a scalable design system and frontend architecture for ongoing product iteration.

testimonial.quote: UI Pirate helped us think through the product, not just the pixels — from IA to shipped Angular UI.
testimonial.author: Xperiti Team

title: Legaltech AI SaaS — APAC's Largest Law Firm

results: A comprehensive AI legal platform that streamlines legal operations for APAC's largest law firm.

testimonial.quote: A transformative platform that brings AI capabilities to legal professionals.
testimonial.author: Legal Team
